title: BCV Venezuela — GDP by Institutional Sector, Constant Prices (Base 2007), Annual
time_coverage: annual series, per file (Base 2007 constant prices)
notes: Direct download worked on first attempt, no flakiness/Wayback fallback needed this session. Page /estadisticas/producto-interno-bruto also links quarterly and Base-1997 vintage files (5_2_1_trim, 5_2_1_anual [Base1997], 5_2_4_* by economic activity, 7_1_7/7_1_14) not downloaded here — this 'por sector institucional, Base 2007, annual' file was judged the flagship current-standard national GDP series.
